extension.summary: Shows Jellyfin trickplay seek thumbnails during video scrubbing.
extension.description: Reads pre-generated Jellyfin trickplay sprite tiles stored alongside your media files, crops the matching preview frame, and shows it via DialogSeekBar skin properties while you scrub. Copy resources/skin-snippet/DialogSeekBar-skin.estuary.modv2.xml into your active skin and rename it DialogSeekBar.xml (take backup of old xml first!). Uses script.module.pillow or tools.ffmpeg-tools for thumbnail cropping.
